summary: Tested auction push notifications, scheduled jobs, event detail page undefined ID handling, and Live Auctions carousel. Backend tests: 16/17 passed (1 transient 502 error). Frontend: Live Auctions carousel working, Auctions page working.

minor.issue: Transient 502 error during test (works on retry)

critical_code_review_comments: Outbid push notifications correctly implemented in routes/auctions.py lines 244-260 - sends push via send_push_notification_to_token when user is outbid
New auction alerts scheduled job correctly added to server.py (runs hourly via IntervalTrigger)
send_new_auction_alerts() in scheduled_jobs.py correctly finds new auctions and notifies users who favorited venues or visited recently
send_auction_won_notification() in scheduled_jobs.py correctly creates in-app notification and sends push when auction ends
Event detail page [id].tsx correctly uses eventId variable (line 52) to handle undefined ID - API returns 404 which is caught and error state shown
Live Auctions carousel on home page shows LIVE badge, title, venue, current bid - working correctly
Auctions page shows ACTIVE NOW section with auction cards and timers

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Live Auctions carousel, Auctions page, bidding all working)

seed_data_creation: N/A - used existing test user and seeded auctions
context_for_next_testing_agent: All auction notification features verified: 1) Outbid push notifications send when user is outbid (lines 244-260 in auctions.py), 2) New auction alerts scheduled hourly (server.py line 158-164), 3) Auction won notifications implemented (scheduled_jobs.py send_auction_won_notification), 4) Event detail page handles undefined ID with 404 response from API. Push notifications require real Expo push tokens from mobile app - web preview won't receive actual pushes but backend logic is testable.

mocked_apis.CherryHub: MOCKED - CherryHub membership API uses mock mode
mocked_apis.Push Notifications: MOCKED on web preview - requires real Expo push tokens from mobile app

outbid_push_notifications.details: Logic implemented in routes/auctions.py lines 244-260. When user is outbid, creates in-app notification and sends push via send_push_notification_to_token()

new_auction_alerts_scheduler.details: Scheduled job added to server.py (lines 158-164) running hourly. send_new_auction_alerts() in scheduled_jobs.py finds new auctions and notifies users

auction_won_notification.details: send_auction_won_notification() in scheduled_jobs.py creates in-app notification and sends push when auction ends with winner

event_detail_undefined_id.details: Backend returns 404 with 'Event not found' for undefined ID. Frontend event/[id].tsx uses eventId variable (line 52) and shows error state

live_auctions_carousel.details: Home page shows LIVE AUCTIONS section with horizontal carousel, LIVE badge, title, venue name, current bid

auctions_page.details: Auctions page shows ACTIVE NOW section with auction cards including countdown timers

auction_bidding_api.details: POST /api/auctions/bid works correctly - tested placing bids, auto-bid, min/max validation

backend_tests_summary.failure_reason: Transient 502 error on health check (network issue, works on retry)
